name: Product Impact
description: Agent-accessible skills for the Product Impact AI product news and podcast site

skills.name: get-latest-articles
skills.description: Retrieve the latest articles across all topics as an RSS feed

skills.name: get-news-feed
skills.description: Retrieve the latest news and analysis articles

skills.name: browse-content-index
skills.description: Full URL index of all site content for discovery

skills.name: get-llm-context
skills.description: Site overview, taxonomy, themes, and content surfaces optimised for language models

skills.name: discover-api
skills.description: Machine-readable API catalog describing all content endpoints (RFC 9727)
